description_long: This object is a compact, handheld gaming console styled in bright red and gray plastic, featuring a prominent screen labeled 'NEO GEO' and two visible game cartridges. The front face displays a black screen with white text, flanked by a speaker grille on the left and a set of colorful control buttons on the right. The cartridges, labeled 'SAMURAI SHODOWN' and 'METAL SLUG 3', are designed to be inserted into the top slot of the console, with their labels clearly visible. The rear view reveals vent-like details and the cartridge slot, while the sides show the device's rounded, ergonomic shape. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metal components for internal electronics. This object is reminiscent of retro portable gaming systems and is likely intended for entertainment use in urban environments.
description: A retro-style red and gray handheld gaming console with a screen, colorful buttons, and two labeled game cartridges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen with 'NEO GEO' branding, speaker grille, and colorful control buttons, with both cartridges visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and rounded edges of the console and cartridge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the cartridge slot, vent details, and the back labels of the cartridges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness and contours of the console and cartridge.
